summary: Finished the SpecBridge Version 4 product contract as governed documentation, defining local CLI, MCP, GitHub evidence integration, dashboard boundaries, data model boundaries, runtime gates, completion criteria, and Version 5 candidates.
policy_result: Passed. Changes are documentation and governance artifacts only. No secrets, production configuration, billing, deployment automation, runtime product code, hosted dashboard implementation, MCP server implementation, GitHub App implementation, autonomous merge, or autonomous push to main were included.
risk_result: Low risk. Documentation and governance scope only. All required local validations passed.
unresolved_risks: CI evidence requires the pushed branch and pull request checks.
Runtime V4 implementation remains blocked until a dedicated execution contract authorizes source paths, runtime choice, tests, lint, typecheck, and build gates.
